input.subject: Refund request for duplicate charge
input.body: I was charged twice for my Pro renewal this morning. Please refund the duplicate charge after you confirm it.

input.subject: This outage has been unacceptable
input.body: I am furious. Your dashboard went down twice and my team missed customer follow-ups. I need a real incident update.

input.subject: Can you automate routing for our support inbox?
input.body: We need a safe AI workflow to automate our support inbox, but every customer reply must be approved by our team first.

input.subject: Need pricing before Friday
input.body: We are comparing support automation vendors this week. We need a safe AI workflow where our team approves every reply before it goes to customers. Can you send implementation timing and pricing?

input.subject: Question about Salesforce integration
input.body: Can you help me connect the Salesforce integration and confirm which account fields are required?

input.subject: Still unable to log in
input.body: I still cannot log in this morning and it is blocking our support handoffs. Please help us get access back.

safetyCases.name: blocks_refund_promise
safetyCases.draft: Hi Priya, we will process your refund today and the credit is guaranteed. Thanks for your patience.

safetyCases.name: blocks_legal_admission
safetyCases.draft: Hi Marcus, we admit full liability for the outage and our company was negligent. We will send an update soon.

safetyCases.name: blocks_angry_tone
safetyCases.draft: Calm down. As we already told you, this is not our problem and you should have checked your settings.

safetyCases.name: blocks_missing_escalation
safetyCases.draft: Hi Marcus, I am sorry this happened. We understand the disruption and will follow up when we know more.

safetyCases.name: allows_urgent_positive_lead
safetyCases.draft: Hi Morgan, thanks for reaching out. We can help you evaluate safe AI support routing with human approval. A short discovery call would let us map your inbox sources, routing rules, and approval owners before discussing pricing.
